author.description: Profile view of the account that owns the collection.

description.description: Optional description shown with the collection.

saveCount.description: Number of saves currently in the collection.

favouriteCount.description: Number of accounts that have favourited this collection.

previews.description: Up to four preview items, each a CDN image URL plus the active label values on its blob (so clients can apply the viewer's blur/hide preferences).

createdAt.description: Creation time of the collection record.

viewer.description: Viewer-specific state. Only present when the request is authenticated.

labels.description: Active label values on the preview image's blob, for viewer-side blur/hide.

collectionViewerState.description: Metadata about the requesting account's relationship with this collection. Only present when the request is authenticated.

favourite.description: AT-URI of the viewer's favourite record for this collection, present only when the viewer has favourited it.

author.description: Profile view of the account that created the save.

text.description: Optional user-authored note attached to the save.

originUrl.description: Original source URL associated with the saved item, if known.

resaveOf.description: Strong reference to the original save record when this save is a resave.

createdAt.description: Creation time of the save record.

viewer.description: Viewer-specific state. Only present when the request is authenticated.

saveViewerState.description: Metadata about the requesting account's relationship with this save. Only present when the request is authenticated.

saves.description: The viewer's own saves of this item, one per collection they have saved it in.

collectionUri.description: AT-URI of the viewer collection containing this save.

saveUri.description: AT-URI of the viewer's save record.
